SHERIFF'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET (CONFIDENTIAL)

MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-01-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS CONTINUED TO MAY 9, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: AFTER REVIEWING THE DOCUMENTS SUBMITTED BY MS. FERNANDEZ IN SUPPORT OF HER CLAIM, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF REMEDIOS FERNANDEZ IS DENIED. ACCORDING TO THE EMPLOYER'S RETURN, JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS A MONTHLY GROSS INCOME OF $11,050.80 AND THEREFORE DOES NOT NEED ALL OF HER EARNINGS FOR HER SUPPORT. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-09-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos.
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Remedios Fernandez, defendant/claimant appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: After reviewing the documents submitted by Ms. Fernandez in support of her claim, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Claim Of Exemption of Remedios Fernandez is denied. According to the Employer's Return, judgment debtor has a monthly gross income of $11,050.80 and therefore does not need all of her earnings for her support. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos.
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Continued To May-09-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: REMEDIOS A. FERNANDEZ, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s Hearing On Claim Of Exemption IS CONTINUED TO MAY 9, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
